description.value:
You have a free tactical flashlight built into your LFAN. Using this flashlight doesn't interfere with your ability to use your hands or your LFAN to interact with or hold other objects. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Digital Diversion] skill feat and can Create a Diversion using Computers instead of Deception by rapidly manipulating the settings on your flashlight. When you do, Create a Diversion gains the visual trait.

[[/act create-a-diversion skill=computers traits=visual variant=gesture]]

[[/act create-a-diversion skill=computers traits=visual variant=trick]]

[[/act create-a-diversion skill=computers traits=visual variant=distracting-words]]
